prerequisites.value: Improved Bull Rush, Merciless Rush, worshiper of the associated deity.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you make a bull rush attack and your combat maneuver check exceeds the target’s CMD by 5 or more, you can attempt to trip the target as part of your bull rush as a free action. This does not provoke an attack of opportunity. Combat Trick Source PPC:WMH Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: After succeeding at a bull rush combat maneuver check, you can spend 4 stamina points to attempt to trip the target with Squash Flat regardless of your bull rush combat maneuver check’s result.
